name: agent-cli
description: Minimal ops-focused CLI agent for Next.js + Strapi deployments (SSH capable).

scripts.demo:ingest:dry:
echo 'diff --git a/tmp/ui.txt b/tmp/ui.txt
index 000..000 100644
--- a/tmp/ui.txt
+++ b/tmp/ui.txt
@@ -1,0 +1,1 @@
+hello' | node bin/agent ingest --apply --dry-run --cmd 'cat'
